name: Buffalo Chicken Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breasts, diced
2 tablespoons hot sauce, or more to taste
1 container part-skim ricotta cheese, about 15 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add chicken; sauté for 4 minutes. Drain well.
3. Stir in spaghetti sauce, water, hot sauce, vinegar, and garlic salt.
4. In a small bowl, combine ricotta cheese and egg substitute. Set aside.
5. Spray a 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
6. Spread 1 cup of the sauce over the bottom of the pan.
7. Arrange 4 lasagne noodles over the sauce.
8. Cover with 1 1/2 cups of the sauce.
9. Spread half the ricotta mixture on top.
10. Arrange another 4 lasagna noodles over ricotta, and top with another 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
11. Spread remaining ricotta mixture on top.
12. Arrange final 4 lasagne noodles over ricotta mixture and cover with remaining sauce.
13. Preheat oven to 350°F.
14. Cover lasagne with foil and bake for 1 hour 10 minutes.
15. Uncover lasagne, sprinkle blue cheese on top, and bake an additional 5 minutes uncovered.
16. Cover and let stand 15 minutes before serving.
